<!-- Chart CH-DST-02 DOT PLOT, role-based (themeable) -->

## DOT PLOT chart (CH-DST-02)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-DST-02",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "comparison",
    "distribution"
  ],
  "form": "two dots per category (two measures) on one scale",
  "data_required": "categories with two comparable measures (planned vs actual, min vs max)",
  "family": "DST",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-DEV-02 (change over time reading)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "the two values are before/after",
      "use": "CH-DEV-02"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- two measures per category on one scale: planned vs actual, this vs that
- Cleveland dot plot use cases

Do NOT use when:
- before/after change (CH-DEV-02 reads direction)
- one measure (CH-RNK-05)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first label",
  "series_labels": "[name_a, name_b] labeled on the first row",
  "categories": "array of {label, values: [a, b], highlight?}"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },

      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 208,
      "right": 800,
      "top": 150
    },
    "row_height": 30,
    "row_gap": 22,
    "category_label": {
      "size": 13,
      "offset": 16
    },
    "value_label": {
      "size": 12,
      "offset": 12
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "note": "shared scale to max of all values"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- series identified by direct labels on the first row, never a legend
- dot_a muted, dot_b primary, connector hairline
- one highlight maximum

### Never do this
- legends
- different scales per row
- more than two dots per row

### QA before delivering
- [ ] series labeled on first row
- [ ] highlight <= 1
- [ ] unit once
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| dot_a | muted |
| dot_b | primary |
| connector | hairline |
| category_label | body |
| value_label | ink |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
